name: Sleeping
text: "Draw 2 treasure cards.  On your next turn
quantity: you may either exit the treasure chamber or stay and draw another dragon card."

name: Dragon Rage
text: "Discard all of your treasure cards.  Then
quantity: roll 2 dice and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result.  Then
column4: all other players in the treasure chamber suffer the effects described above.  Finally
column5: shuffle all discarded dragon cards (including this one) back into the dragon deck."
